name: UOFT - ASR audit override (Office Macro Win32 Imports)
description: Overrides CIS L1 - Defender's BlockWin32ApiCallsFromOfficeMacros (rule GUID 92E97FA1-2EDF-4476-BDD6-9DD0B4DDDC7B) from Block to Audit while UofT collects 30–60 days of telemetry against the UOFT autopilot audience. Action-plan-001 Phase 2.2 / decision tracker A.4 #21. NOTE: ASR Settings Catalog conflict resolution is most-restrictive-wins, so this audit value will only stick on devices that are NOT receiving CIS L1 - Defender — confirm precedence on a pilot device before relying on it.
